evidence: "Really great movie that does romance in a subtle grown up fashion."
"I have been watching TV Sci-Fi since the 1980s."
"The romance happens and we see the characters reaction after words."
"Even though the story is simple and easy to follow, there are twists and surprises that come when least expected."
"The pacing During The Last Two Hours: You won't understand why the pace seem to slow down until the very last minute of the show."
"The movie is 2 hours but there is 19 minutes collectively of action at the start and 16 minutes towards the end."
"The production quality alone is 5 stars in itself!"
"Cinematography: It was the first thing that caught my attention."
"I had no idea Josh Whedon, one of my favorite writer/director of recent, was involved in this until seeing the credits roll down."
"It provides great scenery, amazing romance, and lovable characters, but at a price."
"This is hands down the best acting I've ever seen anywhere!"
"Never have I been so angry, happy, depressed and giddy from one show before and I loved every moment of it."
"It is in my all time top 3 of personal favorite movies."

summary: The user has a strong preference for romance and drama, particularly when they are well-produced and emotionally resonant. They appreciate high-quality cinematography and storytelling, but show a tendency to dislike slow pacing and convoluted narratives.
